explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in C tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in C tier with an overall score of 16 from a base nutrition score of 25. Context dragged it down by 9 points.

topCons.title: sugar density is a major category problem
topCons.explanation: Fruit is supposed to moderate sugar with fibre and payoff, and dates push the sugar side extremely hard.

topCons.title: glycemic behaviour is rough for fruit
topCons.explanation: Much weaker fit than fruits with gentler carb behaviour.

topCons.title: dried-fruit concentration makes the sugar hit even harsher
topCons.explanation: This is the cleanest reason dates should remain below ordinary whole fruits like grapes.
